title: China cautiously stakes out behind-the-scenes role to end Iran war
summary_full: As Trump pursued an unpopular war, Beijing positioned itself as a peacemaker, with little incentive to pressure Iran or annoy the U.S.
summary_public: As Trump pursued an unpopular war, Beijing positioned itself as a peacemaker, with little incentive to pressure Iran or annoy the U.S.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: end Iran war, with little incentive to pressure Iran
